title: Doyle, Matthew -  Director of Communications at No.10 Downing Street - ACOBA Advice
body: "Mr Doyle left his role at No.10 in March 2025.  Strategic Adviser, Malta Film Commission Mr Doyle sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the Malta Film Commission.  The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
